hooks.command: [ -z "${MNGR_AGENT_STATE_DIR:-}" ] && exit 0; [ -n "${MNGR_CLAUDE_SUBAGENT_PROXY_CHILD:-}" ] && exit 0; mkdir -p "$MNGR_AGENT_STATE_DIR/events/mngr/turn_complete" && printf '{"timestamp":"%s","event_id":"turn_end-%s","type":"turn_end","source":"mngr/turn_complete"}\n' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" "$(uuidgen 2>/dev/null || od -An -N16 -tx1 /dev/urandom | tr -d ' \n')" >> "$MNGR_AGENT_STATE_DIR/events/mngr/turn_complete/events.jsonl"
